title: lithocarpus honbaensis
intro: Lithocarpus honbaensis, also known as the Chinese copper beech, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus honbaensis are said to include reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Lithocarpus honbaensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
